productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Black and Red Dial Watch
description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 37 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Square Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel square case Grey genuine leather broad strap and a tang clasp with a two-prong buckle Black and red two tone dial with metallic hands and an eagle print on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters
